textByHashes.52cf23382aa51570cf3ca5757f0528f279fb8ff1: That's me. Do you need something?
textByHashes.053d102f52ed328ce323070339f05b270b069d4a: I'm rather busy with my own research.
textByHashes.299b0560dba804678e0c1ceb63a90c1a49a357ff: Interesting. So you don't know anything about what they found?
textByHashes.94b8538ce666777dac06211154cff51aaa0aa5e7: Fascinating. We've been researching the lizard creatures here for a while now. We have reason to believe they are not of natural origin and may in fact have been created by Xeric or his followers.
textByHashes.c70794f9ba0c5cf0e0bf448d1aabbcdaa2952340: But this quote of yours suggests the lizardmen may have existed during the time of King Shayzien VII, before Xeric's rule.
textByHashes.99543b89ade4606d364a5cee7095b6e065b27134: Yes. This is definitely worth pursuing. In fact, I think I know where we should begin.
textByHashes.96897308dd9ae809ad4f67142be2630ac75306a0: We recently found a small crevice on the western face of the mountain. It seems to be manmade and appears to be older than the rest of the caves around here.
textByHashes.0109a4640a0da63379a81768ec02539014c541d8: Well let us know when you do. It's on the western face of the mountain.
textByHashes.e24682fada945c2adb96af47fd670647bfc61cd5: Hello. Did you find anything in that cave?
textByHashes.aee0ea977732946f687d550f47ce0b3b1d9e01cc: Well in that case, we'll go take a look.
textByHashes.f274c4d0d10ad6e8f18697b66dd53c27dcecc804: This cave is quite fascinating. We could really be on to something big here.
textByHashes.5fbdcbaac4303e6758cd559280de96f5bc4580cb: We've never come across lizards like the ones in this cave before. It would appear that they are a previously undiscovered species.
textByHashes.9c360e1209a2946219f748d455f0260cd1bcf184: That's nothing. The really interesting part is that these lizards appear to be directly related to the lizardmen that roam this region.
textByHashes.a57427fcf067daadbee2f419926394a752bb4eb5: It would appear so. That's not all though. This cave definitely predates Xeric, who we originally believed to be the creator of the lizardmen.
textByHashes.4b642b6352b8a4741d7b9d8f304a51cc9e18aac1: Impossible to say for sure, but with what we've already learnt about King Shayzien VII, I do wonder if he was the one responsible.
textByHashes.aea4b72ec576512e7748ab4ed994503aac433cb4: There are some who believe that King Shayzien VII and Xeric were one and the same. They claim that after his death, the King was resurrected by his followers, taking on the name Xeric.
textByHashes.6d534cb8309af411f3572e65ae5a9efee634ffa9: Anyway, I'm going to carry on with my research. I'd recommend you talk to Gnosi. She's made some interesting discoveries of her own.
textByHashes.ebaedd3416670d9b820681e42f52e92555fa827c: Duffy's the name. I'm a natural historian from Varrock Museum. My team and I are here to explore this mountain.
textByHashes.f8d7942ce74a41d665448adaee6555d12b455117: [laugh][laugh], you adventurers are all the same, never seeing past the fights and treasure...
textByHashes.74fe4adda1d869d0b4add6e6fa1484bdb136c1b0: This Mountain is steeped in natural history, but our main focus is to study the lizard creatures that surround this area.
textByHashes.9f3f85bb532b1dc1b31ee478eb1201749771c315: Indeed, they're a fascinating species! We're hoping to learn about their origins and how they've evolved.
textByHashes.4436411e93137277b65a4ba3e3f6180da9462ba5: However, we're not very familiar with this region so we've enlisted the help of the Kourend Grand Library to aid us in our research.
textByHashes.5ba1066a97e49f9fd94f1893db11ec6484439df7: Well, we have a theory that lizard creatures aren't natural at all, but were created by dark magical experiments.
textByHashes.7644bc7e35176c1c35787d77097c06185e150959: Right now we're looking for evidence to prove this theory, but's it's proving somewhat difficult.
textByHashes.f54f8321e45f5214fa5c4480925731ddd203c900: No thanks adventurer, natural history studies are delicate and precise... but if we ever need something haphazardly destroyed we'll let you know.
textByHashes.c41733807e1f6977800e0025be2d69aa875d18e7: We don't need your help. Run along now, go and play in the dungeons with the other adventurers. I hear they're full of monsters to fight!
textByHashes.1cccb967286d9f96572e80cfaa65f669052ecadf: Try not to get yourself killed, it would be such a tragedy!
textByHashes.20f385875d872f041a70cea2a6fa38ee0f5b9c63: Good thanks. Now that we've found this cave, we're learning more about the lizardmen than ever before.
